## What

<!-- Plugin (JSON in plugins/tools/) or Pack (YAML in plugins/packs/)? -->

**Type:** plugin / pack
**Name:** <!-- e.g. meeting-intelligence -->

## Description

<!-- What does this plugin or pack do? One or two sentences. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Manifest validates locally (`make validate-all`)
- [ ] `data` block accurately declares reads, writes, stores, and phones_home
- [ ] Licence is compatible (MIT, Apache-2.0, ISC, BSD, or Unlicense)
- [ ] `tier` is set to `community`

## Questions?

If anything is unclear, ask in [Discussions](https://github.com/Groupthink-dev/stallari-plugins/discussions/categories/pack-development) rather than blocking the PR on it.
